DatasetTitle: DWELLING TYPE BY ACCOMMODATION TYPE BY TENURE - HOUSEHOLDS
Annotations: 1. 'Shared ownership' is pays part rent and part mortgage.; 2. 'Unshared dwelling' - a household's accommodation is defined as an unshared dwelling if all the rooms are behind a door that only that household can use.; 3. 'In a commercial building' includes in an office building, or hotel, or over a shop.;
